ns0:entry.ns0:title: AFNetworking/AFNetworking
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AFNetworking/AFNetworking
Language: objective-c
A delightful networking framework for iOS, macOS, watchOS, and tvOS.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AzureAD/microsoft-authentication-library-common-for-objc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AzureAD/microsoft-authentication-library-common-for-objc
Language: objective-c
Common code used by both the Active Directory Authentication Library (ADAL) and the Microsoft Authentication Library (MSAL)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MortimerGoro/MGSwipeTableCell
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MortimerGoro/MGSwipeTableCell
Language: objective-c
An easy to use UITableViewCell subclass that allows to display swippable buttons with a variety of transitions.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PureLayout/PureLayout
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PureLayout/PureLayout
Language: objective-c
The ultimate API for iOS & OS X Auto Layout — impressively simple, immensely powerful. Objective-C and Swift compatible.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SVProgressHUD/SVProgressHUD
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SVProgressHUD/SVProgressHUD
Language: objective-c
A clean and lightweight progress HUD for your iOS and tvOS app.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SoCuul/SCInsta
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SoCuul/SCInsta
Language: objective-c
A feature-rich tweak for Instagram on iOS!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bugsnag/bugsnag-cocoa
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bugsnag/bugsnag-cocoa
Language: objective-c
BugSnag error monitoring & exception reporter for iOS, macOS, tvOS and watchOS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danveloper/flash-moe
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danveloper/flash-moe
Language: objective-c
Running a big model on a small laptop

ns0:entry.ns0:title: darlinghq/darling
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/darlinghq/darling
Language: objective-c
Darwin/macOS emulation layer for Linux

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dcloudio/uni-app
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dcloudio/uni-app
Language: objective-c
A cross-platform framework using Vue.js

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gnachman/iTerm2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gnachman/iTerm2
Language: objective-c
iTerm2 is a terminal emulator for Mac OS X that does amazing things.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/GoogleDataTransport
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/GoogleDataTransport
Language: objective-c

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iodefog/VipVideo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iodefog/VipVideo
Language: objective-c
这是一个Mac/Windows聚合App，聚合常见电视/视频/音乐/小说。比如CCTV中央电视台直播免费观看, 爱奇艺、腾讯视频、芒果视频、优酷视频付费电影，VIP会员剧等免费观看，bilibili、美剧、韩剧、日剧、网易云音乐、腾讯音乐、酷狗音乐、喜马拉雅、起点、七猫、有声小说等

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jonreid/OCMockito
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jonreid/OCMockito
Language: objective-c
Mockito for Objective-C: creation, verification and stubbing of mock objects

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kishikawakatsumi/UICKeyChainStore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kishikawakatsumi/UICKeyChainStore
Language: objective-c
UICKeyChainStore is a simple wrapper for Keychain on iOS, watchOS, tvOS and macOS. Makes using Keychain APIs as easy as NSUserDefaults.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoftconnect/ms-intune-app-sdk-ios
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoftconnect/ms-intune-app-sdk-ios
Language: objective-c
Intune App SDK for iOS enables data protection and mobile app management features in iOS mobile apps with Microsoft Intune

ns0:entry.ns0:title: realm/realm-swift
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/realm/realm-swift
Language: objective-c
Realm is a mobile database: a replacement for Core Data & SQLite

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rudderlabs/rudder-sdk-ios
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rudderlabs/rudder-sdk-ios
Language: objective-c
iOS SDK for RudderStack - the Customer Data Platform for Developers. Now supports tvOS, watchOS and macOS tracking!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sparkle-project/Sparkle
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sparkle-project/Sparkle
Language: objective-c
A software update framework for macOS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tonymillion/Reachability
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tonymillion/Reachability
Language: objective-c
ARC and GCD Compatible Reachability Class for iOS and MacOS. Drop in replacement for Apple Reachability

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zendesk/support_sdk_ios
